title: Umami Tender Tunisian Lamb Stir-fry
description: This dish features tender lamb meat marinated with umami-rich ingredients and served over steamed dill pickles for a refreshing meal-prep option.

ingredients.name: Lamb chops
ingredients.notes: Choose cuts with less fat, such as the eye of mutton or shoulder

ingredients.name: Dill pickles
ingredients.notes: Choose whole ones for easier cutting

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Skin on, minced for added flavor

ingredients.name: Oregano leaves
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried, depending on preference

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and lightly grease a baking sheet.
Marinate lamb chops with olive oil, minced garlic, tomato paste, salt, and pepper for at least 30 minutes. Optionally add oregano during marinating.
Slice dill pickles into thin rounds to use as an accompaniment or garnish after cooking.
Sear lamb chops in a non-stick pan until golden brown on both sides; about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer seared lamb to the greased baking sheet. Add more olive oil if necessary, then add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Return lamb to the pan, reduce heat to medium, cover with a lid or foil, and cook until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot with steamed dill pickles as a side dish. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
